title: ceterach officinarum subsp. cyprium
intro: Ceterach officinarum subsp. cyprium, also known as the Cypriot ceterach or Cypriot rock fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae and is native to the island of Cyprus. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as a diuretic and to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ceterach officinarum subsp. cyprium include its potential to help treat conditions such as kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and wounds, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Ceterach officinarum subsp. cyprium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
